WalletWall Vault PR template - keeps this public research prototype inside its

## What changed
<!-- Short description of the change and why it is needed. -->

## Scope
- [ ] Contracts / Solidity
- [ ] Scripts / CLI
- [ ] Evidence, verifier, SP1, or ZK artifacts
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] CI / repo hygiene

## Boundary confirmations
- [ ] No production custody, mainnet-readiness, or audit claim introduced.
- [ ] No real-funds, yield, interest, APY, returns, or income claim introduced.
- [ ] No mainnet deployment or production write path introduced.
- [ ] No private app source, private ABI, production credential, key, seed phrase, or service account material copied into this public repo.
- [ ] Mock verifier limitations remain explicit where mock paths are touched.
- [ ] Trusted-attestation paths are not described as trustless on-chain ML-DSA verification.
- [ ] Package version bumped if this targets `main`.
